benchmark_panel.label: Compliance Automation
benchmark_panel.description: SOX, GDPR, SOC2, HIPAA automated checks and evidence collection.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Domain-specific AI in enterprise is 'Year of 2026'. High willingness to pay.

benchmark_panel.label: Legal Operations
benchmark_panel.description: Contract analysis, clause identification, risk scoring, due diligence.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Harvey (legal AI) is a vertical AI poster child. Strong VC interest.

benchmark_panel.label: Startup YC Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Founder decision support around startup formation, validation, growth, and fundraising.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing benchmark chip for startup specialization and repeated founder workflow mastery.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Coding Workflow
benchmark_panel.description: Prompt-to-code workflow acceleration, codebase navigation, and developer throughput improvement.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Strong developer workflow benchmark with clear tooling demand and visible ecosystem pull.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Security Questionnaire Copilot
benchmark_panel.description: Helps teams answer repeated security questionnaires with reusable evidence, control mapping, and answer updates.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Repeated enterprise sales friction appears around security review loops, especially where answers must be maintained across deals.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: security answer drafting, evidence retrieval, and procurement response packaging
candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving repeated questionnaire response accuracy and speed
candidate_context.user_value_loop: retrieve prior answers, update evidence, submit questionnaire, learn from follow-up requests

benchmark_panel.label: AI RFP Response Copilot
benchmark_panel.description: Helps B2B teams assemble, tailor, and learn from repeated RFP and security questionnaire responses.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Repeated demand appears around high-friction enterprise response loops, especially where teams reuse prior answers.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: response drafting, knowledge retrieval, and enterprise packaging
candidate_context.mastery_surface: improving repeated enterprise response accuracy and speed
candidate_context.user_value_loop: retrieve evidence, draft response, submit package, learn from procurement feedback
